name: PropStream
tagline: Property data and analytics platform
weaknesses: Expensive at $99/mo with no free tier
No AI-powered deal analysis or scoring
Steep learning curve with cluttered interface
Limited automated outreach features
Data can be outdated in some markets
aiwholesailAdvantages: AI deal scoring included on every plan
Starts at $49/mo -- 70% less expensive
Instant spread and profit calculations
Clean, modern interface with zero learning curve
Built-in automated seller outreach sequences
summary: PropStream is a property-data warehouse at ~$99/month best for experienced list-pullers who already do their own deal analysis. AIWholesail starts at $49/month and adds the analysis layer PropStream doesn't have: AI deal scoring 0–100 with reasoning, auto-calculated spreads, in-app skip tracing, AI photo vision, and one-click contract generation.
strengths: Deep public-records access and one of the longest-established databases
Strong list-stacking and bulk-pull workflows for experienced investors
Wide market coverage with multi-source data feeds
Familiar tool — large existing user base and community knowledge
idealFor: Investors who want raw data and already have their own spreadsheets and analysis process — heavy list-pullers running their own comp math.
notIdealFor: Newer or solo investors who want the platform to score deals, surface spreads, and generate contracts in one workflow.
verdict: Pick PropStream if you live in spreadsheets and want a deep data well. Pick AIWholesail if you want the software to do the analysis for you at half the price.

faqs.q: Is AIWholesail cheaper than PropStream?
faqs.a: Yes. AIWholesail Pro is $49/month vs PropStream's ~$99/month — about half the price. AIWholesail Elite is $99/month and adds unlimited AI analysis and 200 monthly skip-trace credits.

faqs.q: Does AIWholesail have the same data as PropStream?
faqs.a: AIWholesail uses public listing data, MLS feeds in select markets, and public records. PropStream has slightly deeper bulk-data warehouse capabilities. For most active wholesalers and flippers, AIWholesail's data is sufficient and is paired with AI scoring PropStream doesn't have.

faqs.q: Should I switch from PropStream to AIWholesail?
faqs.a: If you primarily use PropStream to pull lists and do your own analysis, you may want both during a trial. If you want the platform to score deals, surface spreads, skip-trace, and generate contracts in one workflow, switching to AIWholesail will save you both time and ~$50/month.

faqs.q: Does AIWholesail include skip tracing like PropStream?
faqs.a: Yes — skip tracing is included on both AIWholesail plans (Pro: 25 lookups/month, Elite: 200/month). PropStream charges separately for skip tracing in many configurations.

name: DealMachine
tagline: Driving for dollars and direct mail
weaknesses: Focused mainly on driving for dollars -- limited analysis tools
No AI-powered property valuation or scoring
$99/mo base price with per-lead add-on costs
Direct mail campaigns add significant cost
No built-in deal pipeline management
aiwholesailAdvantages: Full property analysis suite with AI scoring
Nationwide property search without driving
All-inclusive pricing starting at $49/mo
Built-in CRM and deal pipeline tracker
Automated comparable sales and ARV calculations
summary: DealMachine is the best-in-class driving-for-dollars (D4D) tool. AIWholesail covers the screen-based half of the wholesaler workflow — alerts, AI scoring, off-market filtering, skip tracing, contract generation — that DealMachine doesn't. Many investors use both.
strengths: Best driving-for-dollars mobile UX in the industry
Photo-capture distressed houses straight from the car
Vehicle-route tracking and team-driving features
Strong integration with direct-mail providers
idealFor: Investors whose acquisition motion is driving neighborhoods — D4D is their core lead source.
notIdealFor: Investors who source primarily from alerts, MLS data, distress signals, or skip-traced lists — DealMachine doesn't deeply support that workflow.
verdict: DealMachine is purpose-built for one motion. AIWholesail runs the full lifecycle: find, analyze, score, skip-trace, contract, close, assign. Many wholesalers use both.

faqs.q: Can I use AIWholesail instead of DealMachine?
faqs.a: If your acquisition is driven from desktop alerts, MLS data, and distress lists, yes — AIWholesail replaces DealMachine for you. If your primary lead source is driving for dollars, you'll want both: DealMachine for the driving, AIWholesail for the analysis.

faqs.q: Does AIWholesail have driving for dollars?
faqs.a: Not at this time. AIWholesail is focused on screen-based deal sourcing: AI-scored alerts, MLS, off-market filtering, distress signals (pre-foreclosure, tax delinquent, vacancy, code violations), and skip tracing.

faqs.q: Is AIWholesail cheaper than DealMachine?
faqs.a: Yes. AIWholesail Pro is $49/month vs DealMachine's ~$99/month plus per-lead and direct-mail add-on costs.

faqs.q: Does AIWholesail send direct mail?
faqs.a: AIWholesail integrates with email and SMS sequences in-app. Physical direct mail is not native — most users hand off skip-traced lists to a mail provider or run it through Zapier.

name: BatchLeads
tagline: Lead generation and skip tracing
weaknesses: Skip tracing charged per record on top of subscription
No AI-driven deal analysis or scoring
Interface feels dated compared to modern tools
Limited property condition assessment
No integrated investment calculators
aiwholesailAdvantages: AI scores every property automatically -- no manual analysis
Integrated skip tracing included in plans
Modern interface designed for speed
Built-in investment calculators (ARV, cash flow, BRRRR)
Motivated seller detection powered by AI
summary: BatchLeads is built for high-volume cold callers — list stacking and bulk skip tracing at scale. AIWholesail is built for investors who want fewer, better-qualified leads with full AI analysis. If you dial 500 leads/day, BatchLeads. If you want fewer leads with deeper analysis, AIWholesail.
strengths: Strong list-stacking and bulk-list-pull capabilities
High-volume skip tracing built for cold-call workflows
Tight integration with dialers like CallTools and Mojo
Mature lead-management features for call-center teams
idealFor: Cold-callers, lead-stacking teams, and high-volume operators dialing hundreds of leads daily.
notIdealFor: Solo investors who want the platform to score deals, calculate spreads, generate contracts, and pitch buyers without leaving the tool.
verdict: BatchLeads wins on cold-call volume. AIWholesail wins on per-deal depth: AI scoring, comps, ARV, contracts, buyer-pitch PDFs — none of which BatchLeads has.

faqs.q: Is AIWholesail better than BatchLeads for skip tracing?
faqs.a: AIWholesail includes 25 skip-trace lookups/month on Pro and 200 on Elite, included in the plan price. BatchLeads is typically higher-volume but skip-trace credits are billed in addition to the subscription.

faqs.q: Does AIWholesail have a dialer?
faqs.a: No built-in dialer. AIWholesail focuses on AI deal analysis, skip tracing, and contract generation. Dialer integrations (CallTools, Mojo, etc.) are handled via webhooks on both plans.

faqs.q: Can AIWholesail replace BatchLeads?
faqs.a: If you do high-volume cold calling, no — BatchLeads is purpose-built for that. If your motion is qualified-lead-driven (alerts, MLS, distress signals + analysis), AIWholesail replaces BatchLeads for you.

faqs.q: Does BatchLeads analyze deals?
faqs.a: BatchLeads is primarily a list-pull and skip-trace tool. Deal analysis, ARV estimation, AI scoring, and contract generation are not its focus — that's where AIWholesail differentiates.

acquisitionNote: BatchLeads (and BatchDialer) were acquired by PropStream in July 2025. They are now part of the PropStream bundle, not a standalone competitor.

name: Privy
tagline: MLS-connected investment property finder
weaknesses: Very expensive at $197/mo -- one of the priciest options
Requires MLS access through a real estate agent
Limited to on-market MLS properties only
No off-market lead generation
No AI-powered analysis or automated scoring
aiwholesailAdvantages: 85% cheaper starting at $49/mo
No MLS access required -- works independently
Off-market and on-market properties combined
AI analysis runs automatically on every listing
Skip tracing and seller outreach built in
summary: Privy ($197/month) is a mls-connected investment property finder. AIWholesail starts at $49/month and adds AI deal scoring 0–100, auto-calculated spreads, in-app skip tracing, and one-click contract generation — features Privy doesn't include. For wholesalers, flippers, and buy-and-hold investors who want one workflow instead of multiple tools, AIWholesail consolidates the loop Privy doesn't.
strengths: Established product in the real estate investing software space
Privy has a dedicated user base familiar with its workflow
Specialized focus on mls-connected investment property finder
idealFor: Investors specifically looking for mls-connected investment property finder as their primary tool.
notIdealFor: Investors who want a single platform covering deal sourcing, AI scoring, skip tracing, contract generation, and buyer matching — Privy is more focused than broad.
verdict: Pick Privy if you specifically need mls-connected investment property finder. Pick AIWholesail if you want one tool that finds, analyzes, scores, and helps close deals end-to-end.

faqs.q: Is AIWholesail cheaper than Privy?
faqs.a: AIWholesail starts at $49/month. Privy is $197/month. For most plans AIWholesail is the lower-cost option while also including AI deal scoring and skip tracing.

faqs.q: Can AIWholesail replace Privy?
faqs.a: AIWholesail covers deal sourcing, AI scoring, comps, skip tracing, and contracts in one workflow. If your primary use of Privy overlaps with that workflow, AIWholesail can replace it. If you use Privy for a specialized motion outside that scope, you may want both during a 7-day free trial.

faqs.q: What's the main difference between AIWholesail and Privy?
faqs.a: AIWholesail leads with AI: every property gets a 0–100 deal score with reasoning, spreads are calculated automatically, and photo-condition analysis runs on listing photos (Elite plan). Privy is more focused on mls-connected investment property finder.

faqs.q: Does Privy have AI deal scoring?
faqs.a: Not as a core feature. AIWholesail's AI scoring 0–100 with plain-language reasoning is the primary differentiator across most real estate investing tools, including Privy.
